title: keyof T — resolves to a union of string-literal keys
description: `keyof Person` where Person has `name: string; age: number; createdAt: Date` resolves to the union `"name" | "age" | "createdAt"`. The validator is the union of three string literals.
notes: `keyof T` is resolved at the type-checker layer to a union of the prop names as literals. Validation is identical to a hand-written string literal union.
